title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers must shift focus from coding ability alone to understanding architectural fundamentals (security, reliability, cost, performance, maintainability) and leveraging AI agents effectively. The video advocates that modern juniors should prioritize knowing what to build and why, using AI to accelerate work while critically reviewing outputs against core engineering principles.
